title: Novo Mesto、Novo Mesto — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Novo Mesto、Novo Mestoの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Novo MestoはNovo Mestoにある人口23,341の都市です。The economic and cultural center of the Dolenjska region, a historic city on the Krka River known for its Gothic cathedral, the Krka pharmaceutical company, and wine production.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
